introSection: Nessi was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza previously located at Pleasurelands in Newcastle, County Down, Northern Ireland, UK.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train has a dragon theme.

fullText:
Nessi was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza previously located at Pleasurelands in Newcastle, County Down, Northern Ireland, UK.



The ride has a single helix.

The train has a dragon theme.
